query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms) as total_rooms,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM standardInventoryItems) as total_standard_items,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM roomInventoryItems) as total_room_inventory,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms) * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM standardInventoryItems) as expected_records;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM standardInventoryItems) as total_standard_items,
